response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack/web engineer (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) but does not match the core requirements for this embedded security role. The resume shows no native Japanese proficiency (a hard requirement), no Linux kernel investigation or source modification, no embedded networking security experience (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal), and only brief C/C++ exposure at National Instruments roughly a decade ago. Recent work is web/cloud-focused, far from LAN-switch firmware.
strengths: Brief C/C++ experience at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI
Long Linux familiarity and devops/CI exposure
Broad multi-language background including systems-level DLang work
concerns: No native Japanese language proficiency stated (hard requirement)
No Linux kernel analysis or source modification experience
No embedded networking, switch, or security-protocol experience (MACsec, 802.1X, L2/L3)
